ast.name: innerText
ast.source:
This is your personal authentication token for Todoist. Be aware that anyone with this token could access all of your Todoist data. This is stored in plain text in your .obsidian/plugins folder. Ensure that you are comfortable with the security implications before proceeding. 
You can get your token from the "API token" section
ast.target:
这是你的 Todoist 个人身份验证令牌。请注意，任何拥有此令牌的人都可以访问你的所有 Todoist 数据。该令牌以明文形式存储在你的 .obsidian/plugins 文件夹中。请确保在继续之前你已充分了解其安全影响。
你可以在“API token”部分获取你的令牌

ast.name: innerText
ast.source:
Segment for the plugin to detect the start of tasks. 
Supports Obsidian's comments syntax.
ast.target:
供插件检测任务开始的片段。
支持 Obsidian 的注释语法。

ast.name: innerText
ast.source:
Segment for the plugin to detect the end of tasks. 
Supports Obsidian's comments syntax.
ast.target:
供插件检测任务结束的片段。
支持 Obsidian 的注释语法。

ast.name: innerText
ast.source: Obsidian Markdown
ast.target: Obsidian Markdown

ast.name: innerText
ast.source:
Set postfix for tasks. Popular usecases:
"💪" - Keep it up!
"✅{task_finish_date}" - to make it compatible with
ast.target:
为任务设置后缀。常见用法：
"💪" - 继续加油！
"✅{task_finish_date}" - 使其兼容

ast.name: innerText
ast.source: Obsidian Tasks
ast.target: Obsidian Tasks

ast.name: innerText
ast.source:
The special parameter "{current_date}" will be replaced with current date in "YYYY-MM-DD" format.
Another special parameter "{task_finish_date}" will be replaced with task finish date in "YYYY-MM-DD" format.
Also you can use {task_finish_datetime} and {current_datetime} to get date and time in "YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS" format.
Use "{task_created_date}" or "{task_created_datetime}" to show when the task was originally created.
Use "{link}" to insert a direct web link to the task in Todoist.
Note: Non-completed parent tasks can have completed subtasks, 'N/A' will be used for the parent in this case.
ast.target:
特殊参数 "{current_date}" 将被替换为当前日期，格式为 "YYYY-MM-DD"。
另一个特殊参数 "{task_finish_date}" 将被替换为任务完成日期，格式为 "YYYY-MM-DD"。
你还可以使用 {task_finish_datetime} 和 {current_datetime} 来获取 "YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS" 格式的日期和时间。
使用 "{task_created_date}" 或 "{task_created_datetime}" 来显示任务最初创建的时间。
使用 "{link}" 插入 Todoist 中该任务的直接网页链接。
注意：未完成的父任务可以有已完成的子任务，此时父任务将使用 'N/A'。

ast.name: innerText
ast.source:
Renders projects names as headers. 
If disabled, projects names will not be rendered at all.
ast.target:
将项目名称渲染为标题。
如果禁用，项目名称将不会被渲染。

ast.name: innerText
ast.source:
You should disable this if you want to load more than 30 (up to 200) tasks. This is due to a limitation of the Todoist API.
If enabled, subtasks will be rendered as subtasks. 
If disabled, subtasks will be rendered as normal tasks.
Dramatically increases loading time if enabled.
ast.target:
如果你想加载超过 30（最多 200）个任务，应禁用此项。这是由于 Todoist API 的限制。
如果启用，子任务将被渲染为子任务。
如果禁用，子任务将被渲染为普通任务。
启用后会显著增加加载时间。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source:
You are fetching completed tasks with "Render subtasks" enabled. 
This will limit the number of tasks fetched to 30.
ast.target:

这将把获取的任务数量限制为 30。
